allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d[0]['text']; i=t.find\('SVG'\); print\(t[9000:16000]\)")

Bash(ssh junseok@14.32.244.245 'echo "=== nginx dir ==="; ls -la ~/docker/nginx/; echo "=== compose ==="; cat ~/docker/nginx/*compose*.y*ml 2>/dev/null || cat ~/docker/nginx/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null; echo "=== conf ==="; cat ~/docker/nginx/conf.d/default.conf')

Bash(ssh junseok@14.32.244.245 'echo "=== nginx dir ==="; ls -la ~/docker/nginx/; echo "=== compose ==="; cat ~/docker/nginx/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null || cat ~/docker/nginx/compose.yaml 2>/dev/null; echo "=== conf ==="; cat ~/docker/nginx/conf.d/default.conf; echo "=== containers ==="; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"')

Bash(ssh junseok@14.32.244.245 'echo "=== nginx inspect: mounts & config ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "{{json .Mounts}}" | python3 -m json.tool; echo "=== compose label ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "{{ index .Config.Labels \\"com.docker.compose.project.config_files\\" }}"')

Bash(ssh junseok@14.32.244.245 'echo "=== project & workdir ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "proj={{ index .Config.Labels \\"com.docker.compose.project\\" }} workdir={{ index .Config.Labels \\"com.docker.compose.project.working_dir\\" }}"; echo "=== find compose files ==="; find ~/docker -maxdepth 2 -iname "*compose*.y*ml" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== docker dir tree ==="; ls -la ~/docker/')

Bash(ssh junseok@14.32.244.245 'echo "=== image ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "{{.Config.Image}}"; echo "=== ports ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "{{json .HostConfig.PortBindings}}"; echo "=== restart ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "{{.HostConfig.RestartPolicy.Name}}"; echo "=== networks ==="; docker inspect nginx --format "{{json .NetworkSettings.Networks}}" | python3 -c "import json,sys;print\(list\(json.load\(sys.stdin\).keys\(\)\)\)"')
